title: Flight Night
description: Batwing borrows a device that will allow the other Batwheels to fly like her! But if it falls into the wrong hands, it could spell trouble for Gotham.

title: The Ulti-Bat Rises
description: When the Legion of Zoom gains control of the Batcave's giant T-Rex, MOE creates a giant Bat-robot to stop the marauding dinosaur.

title: Bat-Blast-Off!
description: When King Tut steals an ancient artifact that makes his Carcophagus magically fast, MOE equips Bam with rocket boosters to catch the villain and Bam must learn how to control all that speed.

title: Bats in Show
description: Gotham's annual dog show is tonight, and Harley plans to compete for the prized "Best in Show" ribbon. Sensing she's up to no good, Robin decides to enter rough-and-tumble Ace the Bat-Dog to keep an eye on the thieving trickster.

title: The Gotham Guardians
description: Bam must lead a new super vehicle team consisting of Nightbike, Goldie, Grundy, and Kitty after the Legion of Zoom traps the rest of the Batwheels in the Batcave.

title: Bat-Buds Forever
description: Bibi and Batwing must work together to get past the Legion of Zoom in order to deliver a new giant screen to Batcomputer.

title: Betterwheels
description: The Legion of Zoom wants to prove they're better than the Batwheels at doing good for Gotham, so they form their own super-team!

title: The Tumbler Begins
description: Batman calls on his newest, amazingly flexible vehicle -- the Tumbler -- to help him navigate the Joker's funhouse lair.

title: Ride Along
description: After Kitty the Catmobile saves Bam when he's in a tight spot, Bam decides to take her on a ride along patrol in the hopes of recruiting her as a Batwheel if he can convince her to stop playing long enough to focus on their mission!

title: Big Rig Bam
description: Bam must learn to adapt and try something new as he's tasked to dive the Bat Big Rig all the way to Star City, while the Legion of Zoom chases after him.

title: Banebuggy
description: The Batwheels take on a new vehicular villain who keeps growing bigger and bigger while learning that size doesn't always win the day.

title: Wheels Just Want to Have Fun
description: Bibi wishes she could live a rule-free life like Jestah, so she decides to only focus on having fun instead. But when her actions put Batgirl in danger, Bibi must put the fun aside to stop Harley and save her hero.

title: Batty Race
description: When the Legion of Zoom plan to cheat their way to winning the Gotham Grand Prix, the Batwheels zoom into action to emsure the race is won the right way, fair and square !

title: Sizzie Strong
description: Bibi and Batgirl are surprised to run into Harley and Jestah at their favorite popstar's concert, and now they've all got to team up to save the show!

title: Sidecar Chaos
description: Bibi is excited to use her sidecar on a mission with Batman and Batgirl, but can she adjust to the bulky accessory in time to stop Joker and Harley?

title: Mechanic Panic
description: When Jestah injures herself preparing for an extreme sports competition with the other Zoomers, Bibi helps her overcome her fear of going to the mechanic so she can heal up in time to compete.

title: Save the Bat Dance for Me
description: Redbird is convinced that nobody likes his eccentric dance moves, but when Toyman traps Robin behind a dance-themed gauntlet, it's up to the rambunctious rally car to dance his way to victory.

title: Buff's BFF
description: When Buff befriends Mr. Freeze's snowcrawler Snowy, the other Batwheels bristle at the thought of hanging out with a "bad guy…" so Buff sets out to change their minds.

title: Razzle Dazzle Frazzle
description: When MOE creates a new, super sparkly vehicle paint, the Batwheels decide to put on a talent show to see who will get a shiny new makeover!

title: Gotham, We Have a Problem
description: When Badcomputer activates his own satellite and takes control of every computer on Earth, the Batwheels must launch into space to stop him!

title: Spiffledipped
description: While Green Lantern is having his spaceship repaired in the Batcave, the Batwheels want to play with his adorable alien pet, only to discover that this cute critter has wild alien powers!

title: Bibi's Do-Over
description: Everyone is ecstatic when Bibi, Batgirl, and Robin capture Toyman and his Do-Over remote - except for Bibi, who failed to stick the landing on a big jump. Unwilling to accept her failure, Bibi uses Toyman's Do-Over remote until she perfects her jump!

title: Flight of the Kitty
description: Now that Catwoman has equipped Kitty with wings, Batwing tries to teach the easily-distracted Kitty how to fly.

title: When You're A Jet
description: Green Arrow and his Arrowplane, Goldie, come to help Batman take on the Riddler. Batwing is so happy to have another flying vehicle around that she brings Goldie to life and the two become BFFs. But when Goldie eventually has to leave, Batwing learns that saying goodbye doesn't always mean forever!

title: Air-Show Don't Tell
description: Batwing and Goldie secretly decide to participate in the Gotham Air-Show, but when Batman needs their help, they must choose between winning the competition and their responsibilities to fight crime.

title: Ace in the Hole
description: When a group of alley dogs, aided by a heroic stray, are saved from Catwoman by kind-hearted Buff, he brings them all back to live in the Batcave, unbeknownst to the rest of the Bat-Family.

title: Wheel Side Story
description: After being zapped by Penguin's Songinator ray, the Batwheels find themselves only able to communicate through song! They'll need to learn to harmonize as a team to defeat the musical prankster.

title: Bibi and the Bad Seed
description: When Poison Ivy uses a rare pollen-spewing flower to put all of Gotham to sleep, it's up to Bibi to save her friends and save the day.

title: The Wizard of Bats
description: Bibi enters the world of The Wizard of Oz, where she meets familiar vehicle friends and goes on an amazing quest to see the wizard himself!

title: A Tale of Two Bibis
description: Badcomputer captures Bibi and disguises Jestah to take her place with the Batwheels so that Jestah can steal the Batcomputer's motherboard. Can Bibi get free in time to unmask the imposter and save the day?

title: Secret Origin of the Batwheels
description: When Batman, Robin, and Batgirl are all captured, the Batcomputer brings the Bat-Vehicles to life. Now the newly-minted Batwheels must defend the Batcave and face off with the Legion of Zoom… all without Batman's help!

title: Condiment Chaos!
description: Condiment King takes advantage of no Batwheels being on patrol to unleash a barrage of ketchup and mustard on an unsuspecting Gotham.

title: A T-Rexcellent Adventure
description: Super-genius villain Egghead is on the loose, planning to use Gotham Museum's famed giant egg to cook up a record-breaking breakfast.

title: Improvise My Ride
description: When Buff's trusty winch is knocked out of action by Poison Ivy, he must learn to improvise and come up with creative solutions on the fly.

title: Pumpkin Panic
description: On Halloween Night, Poison Ivy brings all the pumpkins to life, creating an army of Snack-O-Lanterns that eat all the candy. It's up to Redbird and Bam to end her pumpkin panic to save Gotham's Halloween fun, as well as their own.

title: It's My Bat Birthday Too, Yeah
description: When the Batwheels celebrate their mutual birthdays together in the park, party games that should be fun start to go mysteriously wrong.

title: Monster Truck Amok
description: Grundy, a giant monster truck, causes chaos as he stomps around Gotham and creates a mess. He's too powerful for the Batwheels to stop, but Buff finds a friendly solution to end the city shaking shenanigans.

title: The Great Christmas Caper
description: When Santa's sleigh is damaged, the Batwheels must help Santa deliver presents to the children of Gotham, and stop the Legion of Zoom from trying to steal them!

title: Stop That Ducky!
description: After snagging an ultra-fuel-cell upgrade, Penguin's Ducky Boat suddenly becomes the fastest vehicle in Gotham. Confident leader Bam must rally the Batwheels to stop the turbo-Ducky!

title: Multi-MOE
description: To ease the burden on MOE, the Batwheels use his duplicating machine to make copies of their repair bot, but the Batcave is soon overrun when the machine breaks!

title: Tough Buff Blues
description: After he takes down Riddler with an impressive wheel slam move, the Batwheels give Buff the nickname "Tough Buff." But Buff abruptly bristles at the name, leading the Batwheels to realize that it's not okay to call your friends nicknames that they don't like.

title: The Bestah Way
description: When Harley Quinn's Hyena goes missing, Bibi agrees to help Jestah look for her.

title: MOE Alone
description: A sneaky trick strands the Batwheels at the docks, clearing the way for a Batcave heist by the Legion of Zoom. It's up to MOE to stop the Zoomers with zany improvised tricks and traps with a little help from Ace and Batcomputer.

title: Up in the Air
description: After he causes the Batwing to crash, Bam becomes obsessed with making it up to her during a high-stakes aerial mission against Penguin and his giant ducky blimp.

title: Batdraft
description: Batman, Buff, and Ace put their new firefighter training to the test when a magical fire breaks out in Poison Ivy's fortress.

title: Kitty Kong
description: When Kitty splashes in Ultra Grow-Gas, she grows enormous! Now, the Batwheels must keep her, and Gotham, safe until she shrinks back down to normal.
